exercises.title: Write Requirements First
exercises.description: Create a one-page design brief with functional and non-functional requirements.
exercises.expected_outcome: You have a crisp problem statement before proposing architecture.

exercises.title: Estimate Capacity
exercises.description: Work through requests per second, storage growth, and bandwidth for a sample system.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can justify the scale assumptions behind your design.

exercises.title: Design a Cursor API
exercises.description: Implement a paginated endpoint with stable cursors and idempotent retries.
exercises.expected_outcome: Large datasets can be fetched safely in pages.

exercises.title: Build a Rate Limiter
exercises.description: Create a small rate-limited endpoint using a token bucket or sliding window.
exercises.expected_outcome: Burst traffic is controlled without breaking normal traffic.

exercises.title: Draft a Full Architecture
exercises.description: Produce an end-to-end design for a service with storage, cache, queue, and failure handling.
exercises.expected_outcome: You have a complete architecture document and data flow diagram.

exercises.title: Plan a Shard Migration
exercises.description: Describe how to move hot data between partitions with minimal downtime.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can explain a safe migration path and rollback plan.
